patient.query: I don’t know… I guess I’ve always thought that being okay meant not showing weakness or needing help. It’s like I have this idea that if I can keep it all together, then I’m doing fine. But then I’m just stuck with this weight, and it feels like I’m convincing myself I can handle it when I really can’t. It’s just confusing, I suppose.
